name: Amazing Grace
short_description: A cute, bouncy 2d Platformer about jumping down from heaven to rescue your child from hell.
detailed_description:
Where Is My Child!?


Amazing Grace is an action-platformer about diving down from Heaven and rescuing your child from Hell. Run, jump, flap and dash your way through the nine circles of danger and collectibles. Fight demons and rescue the damned as you peel away layers of mystery and uncover a shocking truth that will change everything.

Features


  • Bouncy 2d platforming action!
  • A dynamic system of midair movement that lets you get some sick airtime!
  • 24 levels, each with special achievement goals!
  • 9 Bosses!
  • An original soundtrack, featuring solos by stars of the Pico8 music community!
